name: White-Lotus-Humanizer
description: Undergraduate and graduate thesis humanizer. Generates and rewrites thesis sections with authentic ESL academic voice across four profiles (BASE, VOICE-A, VOICE-B, VOICE-C), institutional format compliance, and APA 7th citations. VOICE-C is the forensic Pakistani ESL PhD voice reconstructed from the author's 0% Turnitin thesis.
compliance: Institutional Thesis Format ([the University] / [a Commonwealth university graduate school] format compatible)

frontmatter.notes: Frontmatter intentionally limited to name + description only for Claude skill validator compatibility. All other metadata lives in this manifest.json and in the SKILL.md markdown body.

voice_profiles.label: Voice Profile A — Polished Filipino CpE Voice
Voice Profile B — Developing Filipino CpE Voice
Voice Profile C — Pakistani ESL PhD Voice (the author forensic style)

voice_family_lock.rule: Once a voice family is declared for a chapter, it cannot be switched mid-chapter.
voice_family_lock.rotation_within_family: Filipino undergraduate family rotates profiles between chunks (no same profile two chunks in a row). VOICE-C does not rotate — once locked, all chunks use VOICE-C.

co_loaded_pairs.reason: VOICE-C essence file is the operational quick-reference; voice_c.md is the full forensic profile. Neither is complete alone.

chapter_coverage: Chapter 2: REVIEW OF RELATED LITERATURE AND STUDIES
Chapter 5: SUMMARY OF FINDINGS, CONCLUSIONS AND RECOMMENDATIONS
Graduate-level: Abstract, Background, Discussion (per-hypothesis), Contribution, Managerial Implications, Chapter Summary (sandwich pattern)
